features.name: Mechanical Alarm Trigger
features.rationale: Must_be: every exit monitoring solution triggers an audible alarm; mechanical power-independence assumed. Safety (9): fail-safe at 0V. Confidence (8): FM tech trusts mechanical trigger.

features.name: Key Override
features.rationale: Must_be: FM technicians perform routine battery replacement and device checks. Authorized bypass without triggering a logged alarm event is non-negotiable.

features.name: IoT Connectivity
features.rationale: One_dimensional: FM operators choosing wireless over mechanical-only specifically for real-time event capture. Pain (8): eliminates conduit wiring runs. Time (8): real-time alerts vs. manual rounds.

features.name: Remote Monitoring Dashboard
features.rationale: Attractive: portfolio-level real-time visibility is not available with any incumbent alternative. Pain (9): eliminates manual compliance certificate compilation. Delight (8): FM manager presents live dashboard to client.

features.name: Predictive Maintenance
features.rationale: Attractive: proactive battery alerts transform emergency callouts into scheduled CMMS work orders. Reliability (8): directly addresses N03 battery depletion without CMMS alert.

features.name: Regulatory Compliance Documentation
features.rationale: Attractive and highest-fit feature. Automated timestamped event logs directly address two of the three top-scoring underserved needs. Time (9) + Pain (9): eliminates manual compilation hours. Confidence (9): tamper-evident logs as primary audit evidence.

features.name: Retrofit Capability
features.rationale: One_dimensional: FM contracts are predominantly retrofit. More retrofit-friendly = proportionally lower installation cost per door. Cost (9): eliminates conduit routing. Pain (9): removes the most disruptive installation step.

productRelatedNeeds: Minimize the likelihood of wireless monitoring coverage gaps in large-footprint FM client buildings caused by 868 MHz signal attenuation through reinforced concrete and steel
Minimize the likelihood of battery depletion below monitoring threshold between scheduled FM maintenance visits in high-traffic deployments
Minimize the integration rework required to relay EasyWave-protocol alarm events to client BMS systems standardized on BACnet or KNX
Minimize the likelihood of FM contract specification rejection due to surface-mounted housing protrusion being unacceptable under interior design or heritage conservation rules
